svg.desc: in0 — input node feeding values into the chain readLatch, detectorLatch — latches holding one value until their AND gate fires readGate, syncGate — AND gates controlling latch release (backpressure) i0, i1 — chain inhibitor stages (shift register cells) sbd0, sbd1 — streak-break detectors: fire on sign change (1,-1 or -1,1) sd0, sd1 — streak detectors: fire on same-sign run (-1,-1 or 1,1) a0 — pattern AND gate reducing sbd outputs to one signal
svg.text: Line Topology — Latch + AND Gate Backpressure

g.text: Latches hold values. AND gates control release.
backpressure: one value per pipeline cycle.
Old + new values from inhibitor to detectors
Streak break outputs to pattern AND gate
AND gate output triggers latch to release value
Streak detector signal chain sd0 to sd1
